text_block_list.text: Today marks the start of summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The plan is to prepare for the Japan Cup in late
November where I will face Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My objective is to improve my physical strength
over the summer to ensure victory against her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. I am ready to perform any
type of training.

My last summer camp with Mihono Bourbon kicks
off.
